SPELLCARD.title: Spell Card
SPELLCARD.description: Cards that can be [gold]Upgraded[/gold] multiple times. Has no effect when played directly; requires [gold]Chant[/gold] to take effect.
CHANT.title: Chant X
CHANT.description:
After playing, a copy with full effect will be automatically played after [blue]X[/blue] turns.
Alternatively, [gold]right-click the card[/gold] to lose [blue]5X[/blue] HP to apply full effect immediately, and [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it this combat.
STOP_WIND.title: Stop Wind
STOP_WIND.description: Remove all [gold]Wind Force[/gold]. If in [gold]Wind Rising[/gold], exit [gold]Wind Rising[/gold].
WIND_STATE.title: Wind Rising
WIND_STATE.description:
Damage taken is reduced by [blue]75%[/blue].
At the end of your turn, if [gold]Wind Force[/gold] is below [blue]18[/blue], exit [gold]Wind Rising[/gold].
WIND_SUMMON.title: Summon Wind
WIND_SUMMON.description: If already in [gold]Wind Rising[/gold], double [gold]Wind Force[/gold]; otherwise, enter [gold]Wind Rising[/gold].
WIND_CONTROL.title: Wind Mastery X
WIND_CONTROL.description: When you have X [gold]Wind Force[/gold], trigger the specified effect.
PERSUASION.title: Persuade
PERSUASION.description: [purple]Spare[/purple] enemies with current HP no greater than twice your [gold]Faith[/gold]. [purple]Spared[/purple] enemies leave random rewards.
DEVOTEE.title: Devotee
PIETY.title: Piety X
PIETY.description: When you have X [gold]Faith[/gold], trigger the specified effect.
REMOVE.title: Ephemeral
REMOVE.description: When played, remove this card from your [gold]deck[/gold].
